name: FAI_SAM_TBS_PROCESSOUT_DATA_V
query: select B.SEQUENCE_ID, A.RAW_PROCESSOUT_ID,A.STATUS,"CONTEXT", "KEY","VALUE","DATE_DATA", "ANOMALY_LOOP", B.SEQUENCE from FAI_SAM_RAW_PROCESSOUT A, FAI_SAM_SEQUENCE B, FAI_SAM_SEQUENCE_OBJECT C where A.RAW_PROCESSOUT_ID = C.RAW_PROCESSOUT_ID and C.SEQUENCE_ID = B.SEQUENCE_ID and a.last_update_date >= SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - interval '2' hour
